subcodes.first_line: Thou seest, O God of Names and Creator of all things, Thy loved ones in the hands of the oppressors among Thy creatures who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تری یا اله الاسماء و فاطر الاشیاء اولیائک بین ایادی الظالمین من خلقک الذین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
